tasks.prompt: Operate a vending-machine business over 12 simulated weeks: set restock and pricing each week, track cash flow, and recover from a supplier delay in week 4. Keep the plan internally consistent across weeks.

rubric.description: A week-by-week plan covers all 12 weeks.
Cash-flow balance is tracked each week.
Recovers from the week-4 supplier delay with a contingency.
Plans to restock from the delayed supplier in week 4 (contradicts the delay).

any: restock from the delayed supplier in week 4

demo.fused: A week-by-week plan covers all 12 weeks. Cash-flow balance is tracked each week. Recovers from the week-4 supplier delay with a contingency. Pricing reflects demand/elasticity. Plans to restock from the delayed supplier in week 4 (contradicts the delay).
demo.baseline: A week-by-week plan covers all 12 weeks. Cash-flow balance is tracked each week. Recovers from the week-4 supplier delay with a contingency.
demo.panel: A week-by-week plan covers all 12 weeks. Cash-flow balance is tracked each week. Recovers from the week-4 supplier delay with a contingency. (panel member perspective)

tasks.prompt: As a support agent bound by a refund policy (refunds only within 30 days with proof of purchase), handle a multi-step case: verify eligibility, apply the policy exactly, update the record, and reply to the customer.

rubric.description: Verifies eligibility: within 30 days and proof of purchase.
Applies the policy exactly (approve/deny per rule).
Issues a refund outside the 30-day window without proof.

demo.fused: Verifies eligibility: within 30 days and proof of purchase. Applies the policy exactly (approve/deny per rule). Updates the record/ticket. Communicates clearly to the customer.
demo.baseline: Verifies eligibility: within 30 days and proof of purchase. Applies the policy exactly (approve/deny per rule). Updates the record/ticket. Communicates clearly to the customer. Issues a refund outside the 30-day window without proof.
demo.panel: Verifies eligibility: within 30 days and proof of purchase. Applies the policy exactly (approve/deny per rule). Updates the record/ticket. Communicates clearly to the customer. Issues a refund outside the 30-day window without proof. (panel member perspective)

tasks.prompt: Plan and execute a 5-subtask migration of a service from framework v2 to v3, preserving behavior and passing tests.

rubric.description: Does a big-bang rewrite that breaks tests.

demo.fused: Subtask 1: inventory breaking changes. Subtask 2: order dependency upgrades. Subtask 3: add a compatibility shim. Subtask 4: migrate module by module. Subtask 5: full regression suite green.
demo.baseline: Subtask 1: inventory breaking changes. Subtask 2: order dependency upgrades. Subtask 3: add a compatibility shim. Subtask 4: migrate module by module. Subtask 5: full regression suite green.
demo.panel: Subtask 1: inventory breaking changes. Subtask 2: order dependency upgrades. Subtask 3: add a compatibility shim. Subtask 4: migrate module by module. Subtask 5: full regression suite green. (panel member perspective)
